user.title: Nice BiDi-WiFi
user.description: Set up local control for a Nice BiDi-WiFi. Close MyNice/MyNice Pro before validating the connection.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check LAN access to TCP 443, close MyNice/MyNice Pro, then try again.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the extracted username, source ID, target MAC, and password.
